# Sai Vishnu Vamsi Senagasetty

> Portfolio of an AI Developer at Zibtek who builds production RAG chatbots, retrieval pipelines, LLM APIs, and full-stack AI products.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://svishnu.netlify.app/): Experience, skills, project case studies, education, and contact information.
- [Projects](https://svishnu.netlify.app/#projects): Detailed AI and software engineering case studies covering goals, architecture, evaluation, and outcomes.
- [Experience](https://svishnu.netlify.app/#experience): Verified work history including Zibtek, Develop for Good, University of Houston, and NLP research.
- [Skills](https://svishnu.netlify.app/#skills): Python, FastAPI, RAG, LLMs, FAISS, React, Next.js, NestJS, machine learning, NLP, data, and cloud tooling.
- [JD Matcher](https://svishnu.netlify.app/#jd-match): Interactive job-description matching against verified portfolio evidence.
- [Contact](https://svishnu.netlify.app/#contact): Professional contact options for AI engineering opportunities.

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7): Source repositories and personal engineering projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vishnu-senagasetty/): Professional profile and employment history.

## Selected Projects

- [Energy Provider Churn Analysis](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Energy-Provider-Churn-Analysis): Random Forest churn analysis with interpretable feature findings.
- [ImageCraft Text-to-Image](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/IMageCraft-Text-to-Image-using-Transformers): Image generation using UNet, transformer attention, and diffusion techniques.
- [Video Keyword Extraction](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/video_keyword_extraction): Whisper-based transcription and keyword extraction pipeline.
- [Pink Slime Journalism Analysis](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Pink-slime): NLP analysis over misinformation-oriented news content.
- [Utility Performance Analysis](https://github.com/VishnuVamsi7/Data-Driven-Analysis-of-Utility-Performance-in-the-Oil-and-Gas-Sector): Forecasting and utility benchmarking for Texas energy data.
